debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : Category α
c X : α
⊢ (fun g => comp (Category.id X) g) = Category.id (Hom X c)

proof:
simp [id_comp]
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
failed_attempts:
simp [comp_id]
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by
    funext h
    simp [comp_assoc]

simp [Category.id]
  map_comp := by
    intro X Y Z f g
    funext h
    simp [Category.comp]
    <;> simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
    <;> aesop

rfl
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by
    intro h
    simp [Function.comp_apply, Hom.ext_iff, Category.comp_assoc]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply, Hom.ext_iff, Category.comp_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply, Hom.ext_iff, Category.comp_assoc]) <;>
    (try aesop)

simp [id]
      <;>
      simp_all [id]
      <;>
      try aesop
    
    have h_final : (fun g : Hom X c => (id X : Hom X X) ≫ g) = (fun g : Hom X c => g) := h_main
    simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
    <;>
    aesop

simp [Category.id]
    <;> simp_all [Composition]
    <;> (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff])
    <;> (try simp_all [FunLike.ext_iff])
    <;> (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff])
    <;> (try aesop)
    <;> (try assumption)
  <;> try rfl

simp [Hom.ext]
  map_comp f g := by
    funext h
    simp [Hom.ext, comp_assoc]
    <;> simp_all [comp_assoc]

sorry
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by sorry

simp [Category.id]
    <;> rfl
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by
    funext h
    simp [Category.comp_assoc]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Category.comp_apply])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Category.comp_apply])
    <;>
    (try aesop)

simp [id_comp]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try simp_all [comp]) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith)

simp [Category.id_comp]
    <;>
    rfl
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by
    intro h
    simp [Function.comp_apply, Hom.ext_iff]
    <;>
    aesop

simp [id_comp]
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom X Y) (g : Hom Y Z) := by
    funext h
    simp [comp_assoc]
    <;>
    simp_all [comp_assoc]
    <;>
    try simp_all [CompositionMonoidHom.map_mul]
    <;>
    try simp_all [CompositionMonoidHom.map_mul]
    <;>
    try simp_all [CompositionMonoidHom.map_mul]
successful_attempts:
simp [id_comp]
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
  <;>
  (try
    aesop)
